newSourcesWithUsefulData: Solidigm D7-PS1010 PCIe5 TLC (new brand in PCIe5 TLC category)
keyChangesVsYesterday: 🎉 DDR5 spot $46.000 — 十七连ATH！+1.70%单session最大涨幅记录（from $45.233）
🟢🟢 Mouser QLC 61.44TB U.2: 1→4台，打破33天枯竭
🔴 Newegg 9550 Pro OOS Day 14 — 两周里程碑

DDR5-6400.reason: DDR5 spot $46.000十七连ATH+最大单session涨幅(+1.70%)。自5/20累计+11.92%。零售端NEMIX $1,488维持57天未调整，但spot加速突破使零售补涨压力达历史峰值。DDR4 16Gb逼近$70+DDR3全链加速佐证全面供需失衡。MLC停产9天/WF6停产10天/Micron财报3天后——三重事件叠加。当前零售价仍低于上游成本上升速度，建议在零售调价前立即采购。

DDR5-5600.reason: DDR5 spot $46.000直接推高5600 32GB tracking至¥9,030(▲+¥154)。Tracking值连续57天上行，无任何回调。DDR4/DDR3同步全链加速确认供给端不可逆紧缩。Micron 6/24财报大概率上修全年指引。建议立即采购，等待无益。

PCIe4 TLC.reason: MLC NAND停产仅9天+WF6仅10天——NAND制造史上最紧迫双重供给收缩。Brand split 2.5-2.7x持续Day 50。Gartner NAND+234%。7.68TB Samsung PM1733已停产，替代品价格上涨。ServerSupply PM9A3降价可能是旧型号清仓而非趋势信号。建议在7/1 WF6停机前完成采购。

PCIe5 TLC.reason: Newegg 30.72TB OOS Day 14两周里程碑——零售结构性缺货不可逆。CDW改善至8-10天但非现货。SS $17,700 Day 48稳定。Kioxia CM7-R +43-79%品牌溢价持续。Solidigm D7-PS1010进入市场但价格区间$4,255-$10,218偏高端。需求继续向企业渠道转移，可得性窗口收窄。建议立即采购。

PCIe4 QLC.reason: Mouser U.2恢复至4台(打破33天枯竭)提供短期可得性改善，但单次补货量有限。E1.L 4台Day 15稳定提供替代。MLC+WF6双重供给收缩距终点不足两周，QLC作为主要替代品将承接最大需求转移。$31,000-$34,383价格区间宽。建议分批执行以管理单点供给波动风险。

gaps.note: Day 57。企业级16GB RDIMM极少公开零售。不期望短期改善。
Day 57。同上。企业级16GB容量偏低，零售渠道不覆盖。
仅NEMIX $3,200单一零售来源，第31次请求创建tracking列。HPE/Dell/Hynix OEM/A-Tech交叉验证存在但口径不一。
DiscTech JS offline Day 57(第四个月+3天)。替代CDW+SS+Newegg覆盖可维持但丢失历史可比性。
CDW-G状态今日未获独立验证。下次执行优先确认。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🎉🎉🎉 DDR5 spot $46.000 — SEVENTEEN consecutive ATH with LARGEST single-session gain (+$0.767, +1.70%) in 57-day observation period
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING — June 18 session confirmed $46.000。Largest single-session dollar gain ($0.767) and percentage (+1.70%) of entire observation period。Market closed Jun 19-20 (Dragon Boat Festival) + weekend = 3-day gap。Next session Jun 22。$47 within reach。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 Newegg 9550 Pro 30.72TB OOS Day 14 — TWO-WEEK MILESTONE. Retail structural OOS irreversible.
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL — 14 consecutive days。Two full weeks of retail flagship unavailability。CDW improved to 'expected 8-10 days' but still not in-stock。SS $17,700 Day 48 sole reliable in-stock anchor。Enterprise channel pressure intensifying。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴🔴 DDR4 16Gb $69.125 (+1.47%) approaching $70 — 5th consecutive day outpacing DDR5. DDR3 $10.976 (+1.10%) accelerating Day 11. Three-generation synchronized DRAM supercycle.
escalatedRisks.status: ACCELERATING — Complete DRAM chain DDR5→DDR4→DDR3 all in synchronized acceleration。DDR4 16Gb +$8.025 (+13.1%) in June alone。DDR4 8Gb recovery 3rd day。$70 psychological level imminent。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 WF6 July 1 permanent shutdown — 10 DAYS REMAINING. 2,200 tons/year confirmed gap. Prices +200% YoY. Korean suppliers 70-90% increases notified.
escalatedRisks.status: CRITICAL — 10 days to July 1 shutdown。No new relief information。Combined with MLC exit (9 days), unprecedented dual supply contraction for NAND manufacturing enters final 10 days。12-18 month re-qualification cycle means no short-term替代。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 MLC NAND ending June 2026 — 9 DAYS REMAINING. Samsung final shipments this month. Global capacity -41.7% in 2026. MLC spot tripled to $20-28.
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED — Final 9 days。Samsung Line 12 fully converted to HBM4 DRAM。Combined with WF6 (10 days), dual supply contraction enters terminal phase。

escalatedRisks.risk: ⏳ Micron June 24 earnings — 3 DAYS AWAY. Consensus $34.52B/$19.72 EPS/~81% GM. MU ATH $1,133.99 (+297% YTD). HBM 2026 fully sold out. 2027 HBM pricing +50%. Capex >$25B. Most important memory event of the year.
escalatedRisks.status: UPCOMING — 3 days。Street consensus above guidance。High expectations = sell-the-news risk elevated。Key: FY2027 capex, HBM ramp trajectory, NAND ASP outlook, 9650 PCIe Gen6 SSD detail。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🟢 Mouser QLC 61.44TB U.2 restored to 4 units — breaks 33-day depletion streak. Improvement 15 days ahead of expected 7/6 restock.
escalatedRisks.status: IMPROVED — 4 units in stock。Previously 1 unit for 33 consecutive days。Restock arrived ~15 days earlier than expected。Supply still tight (4 units vs historical 10+)。Price unchanged at $34,356。
